text: Key growth drivers for Apple include the iPhone cycle, services segment, and expanding into emerging markets. The iPhone remains a critical driver of revenue, with upgrades and new model launches typically boosting sales. According to financial metrics, Apple's gross margin stands at 43.31%, indicating efficient cost management and pricing power. The services segment, which includes Apple Music, Apple TV+, and Apple Pay, has shown strong growth, contributing significantly to overall revenue and profit margins. As of the fiscal year, the services segment accounted for approximately 25.31% of net income, highlighting its importance to the company's profitability.

citations.text_snippet: Apple Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables, and accessories worldwide.
